query: SELECT cp.contactId, cp.projectId, p.name as projectName, p.priority as projectPriority FROM contactProjects cp JOIN projects p ON cp.projectId = p.id WHERE cp.contactId IN (1080026, 1080027, 1080028);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT cp.contactId, cp.projectId, p.name as projectName, p.priority as projectPriority FROM contactProjects cp JOIN projects p ON cp.projectId = p.id WHERE cp.contactId IN (1080026, 1080027, 1080028);
